title: athyrium angustum var. elatius
intro: Athyrium angustum var. elatius, also known as the western wood fern, is a deciduous fern native to North America, characterized by its slender fronds and narrow leaflets. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which are attributed to the presence of compounds such as flavonoids and phenolic acids. The health benefits of Athyrium angustum var. elatius include its potential to reduce inflammation and improve respiratory health, making it a valuable remedy for conditions such as bronchitis and asthma. Athyrium angustum var. elatius can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in herbal remedies to promote overall well-being and support the immune system.
